The '''T-4''' model was a ground transport vehicle used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military. 

==Characteristics==
It had an open cab, windshield to protect the [[pilot/Legends|pilot]] and it was lightly [[armor/Legends|armored]] at the side. It was powered by four [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]]; once activated, it produced a hum combined by the different sounds of the power plants. With a five-[[metric ton/Legends|ton]] payload, it was used to carry both equipment and troops. While empty it was capable of eighty [[kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[standard hour/Legends|hour]].<ref name="RA">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref> 

All T-4s, like most Imperial military vehicles, were locked with a keypad tuned to a four-digit code; the factory setting was 0000.<ref name="RA" /><ref name="RAAD">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref> The dashboard controls included a keypad for the code, and four on/off switches for [[engine/Legends|engine]] selection and a starter button. Secondary controls could be activated for the co-pilot. It featured the common buttons, switches and pedals found in other vehicles around [[the galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], such as [[Harvester/Legends|combines]]. There were also side [[mirror/Legends|mirrors]] for rear view.<ref name="RA" />

Some models used by the Empire featured a rear mounted double-barreled energy cannon, inside a lightly armored tub behind the cab. The [[turret/Legends|turret]] had a saddle for the gunner, handlebar controls with firing studs at the thumb positions and sights. There was a safety and a "live fire" switch.<ref name="RA" />

==History==
[[Cadet/Legends|Cadets]] at the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] were certified in T-4 use during their second year, including learning the default security code to activate the vehicle. Most [[company/Legends|company]] [[Stormtrooper Commander/Legends|commanders]] kept it that way, as it was easier than ensuring that all soldiers memorize a new code.<ref name="RA" /><ref name="RAAD" />

During the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="date" /> a T-4 was stationed at the vehicle park near the [[Katarn estate]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], while [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] forces had secured the vicinity. That vehicle was right above a maintainance hatch of the [[farm/Legends|farm]]'s irrigation system from which [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[WeeGee]] emerged trying to escape the Imperial forces and [[Grave Tuskens|Grave Tusken]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. Kyle activated it and with it they tried to get away from the area and reach [[Barons Hed|Baron's Hed]].<ref name="RA" /><ref name="RAAD" /> A pursuit with [[Speeder bike/Legends|Speeder bikes]] followed and Katarn made use of the turret to fend off the Tusken [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]]. [[Bordo]] with other Turkens managed to board it, right before it was destroyed when it slammed into an Imperial roadblock; the resulting explosion killed the Tuskens, a [[platoon/Legends|platoon]] of Stormtroopers, threw an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] off the bridge, and raised a wall of fire, into which the Tuskens who moved too fast blew up. However the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' managed to save Kyle and his droid in time.<ref name="RA" /><ref name="RAAD" />

During the year [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]<ref name="date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''Jedi Knight'' to [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. According to the opening scrawl, ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' takes place five [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]] after the events of ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'', therefore [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].</ref> a T-4 was stationed in the [[Katraasii Spaceport]]. In [[Mission to negotiate supplies from Ka'Pa the Hutt|her attempt]] to catch [[Abron Mar]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] was blocked by a bulkhead door of a small [[speeder/Legends|speeder]] bay Mar was hiding, and she utilized the T-4 to break through.<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''</ref>

{{Veh-stub}}
